ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each gene (e.g., ENSG00000138061) */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome on which the gene is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand of the gene (positive or negative) */,
  "gene_biotype" TEXT /* Biotype of the gene (e.g., protein-coding, lncRNA) */,
  "external_id" TEXT /* External gene identifiers (e.g., NCBI Gene ID) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was analyzed */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the organism from which the experiment data was obtained */,
  "tissue_type" TEXT /* Type of tissue from which the samples were taken */,
  "condition_1" TEXT /* First experimental condition */,
  "condition_2" TEXT /* Second experimental condition (if applicable) */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform or technology used for the experiment */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the experiment was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the experiment */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the experiment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("username"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("username")
)

CREATE TABLE "expression_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* ID of the gene */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "logFC" REAL /* Log fold change */,
  "AveExpr" REAL /* Average expression */,
  "t_statistic" REAL /* T-statistic */,
  "P_Value" REAL /* P-value */,
  "adj_P_Val" REAL /* Adjusted p-value */,
  "B_statistic" REAL /* B-statistic */,
  "score" REAL /* Score */,
  "replicate" INTEGER /* Replicate number of the experiment */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition under which the gene expression was measured */,
  "fold_change_direction" TEXT /* Direction of fold change (up, down, or unchanged) */,
  "q_value" REAL /* Q-value, another measure of significance */,
  "gene_biotype" TEXT /* Biotype of the gene */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expression_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expression_data_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, administrator) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* ID of the gene */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the annotation (e.g., Gene Ontology, KEGG) */,
  "annotation" TEXT /* Annotation details */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the annotation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the annotation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_annotations_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)
